rust_quality.notes: Locked metadata, rustfmt, Clippy with warnings denied and all workspace tests are release blocking.

service_mode_chaos.notes: PostgreSQL and JetStream ownership, restart, redelivery and contention profiles remain release blocking.

client_reconnect.notes: Event cursor restart and Runtime-owned PTY disconnect behavior are tested.

workspace_capacity.notes: Incremental changed-file work remains bounded by the declared release capacity profile.

backup_restore.notes: A real isolated pg_dump and pg_restore drill is part of exact-commit hardening.

migration_compatibility.notes: Upgrade compatibility and rollback checks are scripted and release blocking.

security_audit.notes: RustSec, source and license policy, threat analysis and supply-chain controls remain mandatory.

secret_leakage.notes: Tracked-source secret patterns and malicious plugin environment probes are tested.

plugin_isolation.notes: Native Linux and portable Wasmtime plugin boundaries remain default-deny.

sbom.notes: CycloneDX SBOM generation is bound to the locked Rust and VS Code manifests.

release_artifacts.notes: Checksummed archives, exact build information and GitHub provenance attestations are required.

observability.notes: Release-blocking alerts cover Runtime, scheduler, outbox, locks, providers and consumers.

runbooks.notes: Operational response, recovery, rollback and GA review records are present.

tenant_runtime_isolation.notes: Every tenant uses a distinct PostgreSQL schema, restart persistence is tested and cross-tenant access resolves as not found.

billing_idempotence.notes: Usage and payment-provider operations are tenant-scoped, append-only where required and protected by idempotency keys.

portable_sandbox_os_matrix.notes: The portable Wasmtime sandbox is qualified on Linux, macOS and Windows with default-deny capabilities.

adapter_certification_activation.notes: Runtime startup requires exact adapter ID, version, kind and build commit; verified certification files ship in the release package.
